about_deal_html:
Professional StaffAromatherapy IncludedMultiple Locations

Sanctuary Awaits: Swedish or Deep‑Tissue Massage, Aromatherapy & Steam Bliss

Is chronic neck and back stiffness weighing you down? Escape the daily grind and find your sanctuary with a deeply relaxing massage. At Heavenly Massage, they are known for creating an ultimate sanctuary for unwinding and rejuvenation.

Why You'll Love It

✓

Choose your perfect massage: Select a classic Swedish massage for circulation or a Deep-Tissue massage to target chronic stiffness.

✓

Enhanced Relaxation: Each session includes aromatherapy and a soothing steam shower for a complete sensory escape.

✓

Targeted Relief: Experience rapid stroke techniques designed for instant tension release in areas like the neck and lower back.

✓

Optional CBD Oil: Enhance your massage with CBD oil for additional relaxation benefits.

✓

Couples or Solo: Enjoy a serene experience alone or share a moment of tranquility with a partner.

Plan Your Treatment

Choose Your Massage Modality & Duration
+

60-Minute Swedish or Deep-Tissue Massage for 1 or 2

Includes Aromatherapy & Steam Shower Aroma Enhancements.

90-Minute Swedish or Deep-Tissue Massage for 1 or 2

Includes Aromatherapy & Steam Shower Aroma Enhancements.

60-Minute Swedish or Deep-Tissue Massage Session

Includes CBD Oil and Aromatherapy.

90-Minute Swedish or Deep-Tissue Massage Session

Includes CBD Oil and Aromatherapy.

Therapists: all licensed LMTs · Private treatment rooms · Hands-on time slightly less than total session length (industry standard).

Booking & Aftercare
+

Before your appointment

Arrive 10-15 minutes early to check in and prepare for your session. Communicate any specific areas of tension or preferences to your therapist.

After your appointment

Drink plenty of water to help flush toxins released during the massage. Enjoy the lingering sense of calm and rejuvenation.

Available add-ons

Aromatherapy · Steam Shower Aroma Enhancements · CBD oil

Gratuity not included.

How It Works

1. Grab Your Deal — Purchase your Groupon voucher to lock in the price.
2. Book Your Appointment — Call or book online; advance booking is recommended for weekends and gifting peaks.
3. Arrive Relaxed — Get there 10 minutes early to complete the intake form and discuss pressure preferences.
4. Show Up & Redeem — Present your voucher at check-in. The therapist confirms preferences before the session begins.
5. Unwind & Reboot — Hydrate, take it easy for the rest of the day, and consider booking your next session before you leave.

About the Practitioner

Founded by Jim Bakopoulos, Heavenly Massage offers a serene and therapeutic escape across five convenient Illinois locations—Morton Grove, Mount Prospect, Chicago, Schaumburg, and Orland Park. Licensed practitioners specialise in Swedish, Deep‑Tissue, and other massage techniques tailored to individual needs, ensuring every session promotes relaxation, replenishment, and rejuvenation. With a focus on creating a calming environment and expert care, Heavenly Massage makes it easy to discover lasting wellness and smooth stress relief close to home.

Explore More Ways to Relax

Massage Packages
  • Massage Session for Two (60/90 Min)
  • CBD Oil Massages
Spa & Beauty
  • Full Spa Day Packages
  • Massage & Facial Combos
  • Hydra Peel Facial Session
  • Custom Manicure & Pedicure
Detox & Wellness
  • Detox Mud Wrap & Sugar Scrub
  • Pampering Packages

review_quotes.text: I had a very relaxing time and highly recommend this place. Great customer service, clean facilities, and booking is just a phone call away.
review_quotes.author: Cintya

review_quotes.text: Bought a pedicure for my daughter and she said it was very relaxing and professional. Her feet look great.
review_quotes.author: kelly

review_quotes.text: This was worth every dime.  The staff took pride in there service.
review_quotes.author: monica

review_quotes.text: They were amazing. I will be back.
review_quotes.author: Elijha

review_quotes.text: They're all nice, and friendly.  The place is a good massage spa place.
review_quotes.author: Emer
